creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-05-16 22:44:20 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/luckybackup Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  luckyBackup is a QT4 application that backs-up and synchronizes directories
  using the power of rsync. It is simple to use, fast (only transfers changes
  made), safe, reliable, and fully customizable.
  
  WWW: http://luckybackup.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/134532
  Submitted by:   Jason E. Hale <bsdkaffee at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1107    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +38 -0     ports/sysutils/luckybackup/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/luckybackup/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/sysutils/luckybackup/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +82 -0     ports/sysutils/luckybackup/pkg-plist (new)
